content:
🚀 sshb | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a fun, interactive Tamagotchi-like experience within the user's terminal environment, enhancing engagement with command-line usage.
✨ Key Features: • Tamagotchi-style virtual pet in the terminal • Persistent pet state • ASCII art pet with animated expressions • Four core stats: Hunger, Energy, Happiness, Health • Background daemon for stat decay (systemd)
📖 Summary: SSHB (SSH Buddy) is a terminal-based Tamagotchi-style virtual pet that lives in your command line. It requires regular care, with its stats decaying over time, and can be integrated into your bash prompt to display its status.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
